title: Build ERC20 buy() with auto-derived merkle proof via dexe_otc_buyer_buy (dryRun)
notes: Phase B — exercises dexe_otc_buyer_buy ERC20 path with `whitelistUsers` supplied. Tool builds the merkle tree from the list, finds the buyer's index, generates the proof, then emits an approve + buy payload pair. dryRun keeps preflight non-fatal so the scenario passes even when the buyer wallet has zero of the payment token.

successCriteria.check: buy.proofLength > 0 (merkle proof generated for the buyer's address)
buy.steps last 2 entries are ERC20.approve(...) followed by TokenSaleProposal.buy(tier=2, ERC20, amount). Both have chainId == 97.
